title: [MTR4]NS Trains Pack
description: This Resource Pack adds Nederlandse Spoorwegen Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![NS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/878f90ba414df574a28cabb808491c8559aa85a6.png)

## Nederlandse Spoorwegen Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway

## Introduction
This resource pack adds NS trains for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway** (MTR4)

## Terms & Disclaimer

This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

for more information, check readme inside the pack.

## Contents

* NS Class 1700
* NS Sprinter New Generation Train
* NS ICM/ICMm, ICR Carriage
